One of the most resin-rich landrace indicas in existence, cultivated in the flatlands near the Uzbek border. Known as 'the king of Afghan hash' and used for millennia for traditional hashish production.
Mazar-i-Sharif is a UNESCO World Heritage city and one of the key historic cannabis-producing regions in the world.
A high-altitude Himalayan landrace traditionally grown in the Parvati Valley of India for the production of Malana Cream charas — one of the world's most coveted hand-rubbed hashishes.
Malana Cream charas from this region commands the highest prices of any hashish in the world and has its own distinct caste system among growers.

The broad family of Jamaican landrace genetics that gave the world Lamb's Bread and dozens of other tropical sativas. Characterized by soaring cerebral highs tied to the Rastafarian spiritual tradition.
Jamaican cannabis cultivation has been documented since the 19th century and is deeply embedded in both Rastafarian religion and Jamaican national identity.
A rare pure sativa from the highlands of Rwanda known for its exceptionally fine aroma — sweet, floral and fruity. Delivers a gentle energizing effect used in traditional Rwandan culture.
Rwandan cannabis was documented by Belgian colonial records as a major agricultural crop grown across the Great Lakes region of Central Africa.
An East African coastal sativa grown along the shores of the Indian Ocean. Produces a mellow, social high reminiscent of other African landraces with a distinctly citrus-earth aroma.
Mozambican cannabis was historically traded across the Indian Ocean spice routes to South Asia and the Middle East.

Sensi Seeds' homage to Jimi Hendrix. Jack Flash combines the psychedelic Haze genetics with Skunk's commercial vigor to deliver a powerful cerebral high in a more manageable plant structure than pure Haze.
Jack Flash is named after the Rolling Stones song and Jimi Hendrix's style — though the 'Jack' in the name is a nod to Jack Herer genetics.

Named for cannabis advocate Dr. Lester Grinspoon. A nearly pure Haze variety with minimal bud structure and maximum terpene expression — completely unusual-looking compared to any other strain. An extreme collector's piece.
Dr. Lester Grinspoon of Harvard Medical School wrote 'Marihuana Reconsidered' in 1971 — one of the first mainstream academic arguments for cannabis legalization.

A true Hawaiian classic from the 1970s that defined the 'island high' experience — light, tropical, purely uplifting with sweet pineapple and citrus notes. One of the most beloved strains of the counterculture era.
Maui Wowie was the premier cannabis of the 1970s surf culture and one of the first strains to be marketed specifically for its geographic origin.
TH Seeds' acclaimed hybrid balancing a classic California sativa with Afghani structure. SAGE delivers a clean, long-lasting cerebral high with a distinctive sage and sandalwood aroma.
SAGE won the High Times Cannabis Cup in 2001 and helped establish TH Seeds as one of the preeminent cannabis breeding operations in the world.

Created by Vic High of BC Growers, Space Queen combines Romulan's indica mass with C99's cerebral explosion. Delivers an unusually sweet, fruity aroma with euphoric effects that transport the mind somewhere otherworldly.
Space Queen is one of BC's most beloved legacy strains and a parent of Jack the Ripper and several other celebrated hybrids.

An accidental but legendary strain created by a Hawaiian Romulan male accidentally pollinating an Island Sweet Skunk female in Topeka, Kansas. A perfectly balanced tropical-citrus sativa-leaning hybrid.
Golden Goat is one of the few iconic American cannabis strains to originate in the Midwest rather than on the West Coast.

Sensi Seeds' powerhouse four-way indica cross combining the best heavy indica genetics. Black Domina is one of the heaviest, most sedating pure indicas commercially available — recommended only at night.
Black Domina is the indica benchmark against which all other heavy indicas are measured — Sensi Seeds' definitive statement on what an indica can be.

One of the most popular pure indica strains to emerge from California's Bay Area. Purple Kush delivers total body relaxation with a sedating, long-lasting blissful effect and a sweet, earthy grape aroma.
Purple Kush is consistently one of the top 10 most-searched strains on Leafly and has been so for over a decade.

A perfectly balanced cross of two California classics. Blueberry Headband marries the sweet berry of DJ Short's Blueberry with the cerebral pressure sensation of Headband to create a uniquely clear-headed hybrid.
Blueberry Headband represents the 'second generation' of California cannabis breeding — combining two signature Northern California strains into something greater than both.

Famous for the sensation of pressure users feel around their temples — like wearing a headband. Headband's combination of OG Kush and Sour Diesel creates long-lasting, creamy, dreamy euphoria with serious potency.
Headband gets its name from the pressure sensation users feel around their temples after smoking — a unique effect that makes it instantly recognizable.

Despite its name, LSD doesn't produce psychedelic effects — it just produces an unusually potent, clear-headed cerebral high. Barneys Farm's award-winning creation combines Mazar's heaviness with Skunk's vigor for exceptional yield and potency.
LSD won the Cannabis Cup in 2008 and was one of Barney's Farm's first major international award-winning strains.

One of the highest-yielding sativa hybrids ever bred. Dinafem's Moby Dick crosses White Widow's resin production with Haze's cerebral glory to create a massive-yielding, potent sativa that consistently performs at commercial scale.
Moby Dick has broken yield records in multiple grow competitions and consistently produces some of the highest per-plant sativa yields of any hybrid.

Barney's Farm's three-way cross combining three distinct landrace genetics. Sweet Tooth delivers a surprisingly complex sweet, floral aroma and gentle balanced effects despite its all-landrace lineage.
Sweet Tooth won the Cannabis Cup in 2000 and introduced many European cannabis consumers to the concept of terpene-forward breeding focused on aroma and flavor.
A fruity indica classic named for the overwhelming tropical mango scent it produces. One of the most flavor-forward strains of its era, with a sweet myrcene-rich terpene profile.
Mango's extraordinarily fruity aroma is driven by exceptionally high myrcene content — one of the highest recorded in the late-1990s era of cannabis genetics.
Originating in Indiana and refined by companies in the Netherlands, Bubblegum's sweet, artificial-bubblegum candy aroma launched the flavored cannabis breeding trend. Multiple Cannabis Cup winner.
Bubblegum was one of the first strains bred specifically for an artificial-candy aroma rather than classic cannabis terps — pioneering the flavor-forward breeding movement of the 1990s.
A stocky, powerful indica derived from White Widow with an even heavier yield and more sedating effect profile. Named for its stubby, horned appearance during flowering.
White Rhino was developed by Great White Shark Seeds as a high-yield commercial derivative of White Widow — sacrificing some of White Widow's cerebral energy for more knockout body weight.

Barney's Farm's Cannabis Cup-winning strain with a vivid citrus-orange aroma and balanced euphoric effects. Tangerine Dream's commercial success inspired the first wave of Tangie-style citrus breeding.
Tangerine Dream won the Cannabis Cup in 2012 and directly inspired the breeding of Tangie, which itself became the pillar of an entirely new citrus-forward breeding movement.
Barneys Farm's British contribution — Pineapple Chunk combines UK Cheese genetics with pineapple sweetness and Skunk foundation. An unusually easy-to-grow hybrid with exceptional bag appeal.
Pineapple Chunk is one of the few UK-bred strains to achieve significant international commercial success, winning multiple awards in European Cannabis Cup competitions.

BC's answer to OG Kush — a dominant OG phenotype that became a West Coast legend. Pink Kush's candy-sweet, vanilla floral aroma and full-body knockout made it Canada's most beloved indica for decades.
Pink Kush consistently tops Canadian cannabis sales charts and was one of the first strains to develop dedicated 'Pink Kush only' consumer followings in the BC market.

Apothecary Genetics' deep purple indica with an intense grape candy aroma. Grape Ape's relaxing, heavy body effects and visually arresting purple buds made it a dispensary staple and a key parent strain.
Grape Ape is a parent strain of Gelato through its contribution to the 'purple' genetics used in Sunset Sherbet — an indirect but significant genetic contribution.
Named after the French king famous for his love of luxury. King Louis is a California dispensary staple — a heavy OG Kush variant with an earthy pine and skunk aroma and a deeply sedating effect.
King Louis XIII is named after the French monarch who reportedly died in 1643 from a cannabis-laced pipe — though this historical claim is disputed by scholars.
A crossing of Fire OG and The White that produces extraordinary trichome coverage and a fuel-dominant aroma. WiFi OG (White Fire OG) is one of the most reliably potent OG-family hybrids available.
WiFi OG's nickname 'White Fire' refers to the white-ash quality of its combustion — a sign of proper flushing and curing — not the wireless standard.

Cali Connection's powerhouse OG cross produces one of the most intensely psychoactive hybrid effects available — Alien OG hits the mind first with a spacial, almost dissociative euphoria before settling into heavy body relaxation.
Alien OG's name references both its extraterrestrial-level potency and its Alien Kush parent strain — Cali Connection's way of saying this strain is from another world.

The original Bubba Kush phenotype collected before 1998, before it was refined and distributed commercially. Pre-98 Bubba represents the purest expression of Bubba Kush genetics — heavier and more complex than later versions.
Pre-98 Bubba Kush clones are among the most protected genetics in California — original cuts from before 1998 are considered invaluable horticultural heritage.

Serious Seeds collaboration producing one of the finest fruit-forward hybrids available. Strawberry Banana's complex strawberry-banana tropical aroma and heavy relaxing effects earned it multiple cannabis awards.
Strawberry Banana won multiple Cannabis Cup awards in 2015 and helped establish Florida as a legitimate cannabis genetics development hub.
Humboldt Seed Company's premium hybrid with a rich vanilla-cream aroma. Delivers a smooth, full-body euphoria with cerebral clarity — one of the smoothest smoking indulgent strains of the modern era.
Vanilla Frosting is one of Humboldt Seed Company's most awarded commercial strains and exemplifies the Northern California farm-to-table cannabis ethos.
An explosive three-way OG cross producing intense fuel aromas and knockout sedative effects. High Octane OG's name perfectly describes both the chemical terpene profile and the high-powered effect.
High Octane OG is a benchmark strain for OG Kush terpene complexity and is frequently used in sensory evaluation training for cannabis industry professionals.

A cross of two famously pungent strains creating one of the most aggressively aromatic modern strains. Garlic Breath produces extraordinary resin, complex savory-pharmaceutical terpenes, and deeply sedating effects.
Garlic Breath joins GMO Cookies in defining the 'savory' category of modern cannabis — strains bred for complex non-sweet terpene profiles aimed at connoisseur markets.

Named after the sour-then-sweet candy, this hybrid delivers a sharp, sour citrus punch that mellows into a sweet, smooth, euphoric high. An accessible, crowd-pleasing hybrid with excellent bag appeal.
Sour Patch consistently ranks as one of the top 20 most-reviewed Hybrid strains on Leafly due to its approachable effect profile and memorable flavor.

A natural combination of two Cookies family pillars. Sherblato merges Sunset Sherbet's energetic citrus uplift with Gelato's creamy sweetness for a perfectly balanced, flavor-rich euphoric experience.
Sherblato is considered one of the most 'balanced' Cookies family crosses — equally appealing to Sherbet fans and Gelato fans, bridging both communities.
Named for its high-test fuel aroma and rocket-launching effect. G6 (Jet Fuel) delivers a fast-acting, energetic sativa high with skunk-fuel aromatics that announce themselves from across the room.
Jet Fuel (G6) takes its secondary name from the aviation fuel grade — a nod to the overwhelming fuel aroma that makes it instantly identifiable.
Delicious Seeds' sweetly aromatic hybrid combining Power Plant's vigor with Lavender's floral, candy-like terpene profile. Produces a gentle, approachable euphoria suitable for all experience levels.
Cotton Candy Kush is one of the most recommended beginner-friendly strains in European cannabis culture due to its forgiving growth and pleasant, non-overwhelming effect profile.
California's platinum-level OG — a three-way cross producing silvery-white trichome coverage so dense the buds look plated. Heavy sedating effects arrive quickly and last unusually long.
Platinum OG's name refers to its silvery trichome coating that gives buds a platinum-like sheen — one of the most visually distinctive OG phenotypes.

Combining Banana OG's tropical banana aroma with Runtz's candy sweetness creates a flavor profile that's genuinely unlike anything else — a tropical banana candy experience delivering potent balanced effects.
Banana Runtz is among the most hyped Runtz crosses, commanding premium prices in California dispensaries for its extraordinary aroma profile.

A striking combination of grape candy sweetness and fuel-forward diesel. Grape Gas delivers a fast-hitting, intensely euphoric rush followed by deep physical relaxation — one of the most balanced high-potency modern strains.
Grape Gas is considered one of the elite crosses born from the Runtz-era of breeding and commands top-shelf prices in California's premium dispensary market.

A Spanish masterpiece with a rich caramel-chocolate-vanilla terpene profile reminiscent of the Latin American sweet. Delivers a warming, relaxing euphoria with pronounced sweet cream flavors rare in cannabis.
Dulce de Leche is considered one of the most authentic 'dessert terpene' strains in European cannabis — a benchmark for sweet, creamy flavor profiles.
One of BC's most notorious strains — named after a Vancouver drug trafficking organization. Black Tuna delivers extreme sedation with a sharp, pungent skunk-fish aroma.
Black Tuna was named after the Black Tuna Gang — a 1970s drug trafficking organization — cementing its outlaw cannabis heritage.

One of the original California purple strains from Mendocino County with a distinctive grape and skunk aroma. Purple Urkle is a parent of Granddaddy Purple and a foundational strain of the entire purple cannabis category.
Purple Urkle is one of the two parent strains of Granddaddy Purple — without Purple Urkle, the entire purple cannabis category as we know it would not exist.
A zesty, bright sativa with intense lemon candy aroma from the crossing of Lemon Skunk and Silver Haze. Lemon Haze delivers long-lasting, cheerful, motivating effects.
Lemon Haze inspired an entire family of lemon-skunk hybrid breeding that stretches into the modern market through Super Lemon Haze and Lemon Cherry Gelato.

Blue Dream crossed with Snoop Dogg's personal favorite Master Kush — an official Leafly collaboration strain. Snoop's Dream delivers Blue Dream's euphoric energy grounded by Master Kush's indica depth.
Snoop's Dream was developed as an official collaboration between Leafly and Snoop Dogg — one of the first celebrity co-designed cannabis strains with documented genetic providence.

A Chemdawg family member with extraordinary trichome production — buds appear galaxy-like under light, covered in glinting trichomes. Delivers a classic Chemdawg fuel-chemical aroma with euphoric, energizing effects.
Stardawg's trichome coverage is so dense that the buds appear to glow with starlike points of light under direct lighting — hence the name.
Gelato phenotype 47 — one of the most potent and flavor-forward of the entire Gelato family. Mochi (Gelato 47) produces dense, almost spherical buds with an intensely sweet, doughy cream aroma.
Gelato #47 'Mochi' tests consistently higher in potency than most other Gelato phenotypes and became a favorite among the highest-end California dispensaries.

DNA Genetics' powerhouse combination of Sour Diesel's classic New York fuel with Tangie's California orange citrus. Sour Tangie delivers extraordinary energy and focus with a terpene profile unlike anything else.
Sour Tangie is frequently cited by cannabis chefs and beverage makers as the most food-pairing-friendly strain due to its complex citrus-diesel terpene interaction.
Ohio's most beloved regional strain — Electric Lemon G is a Midwestern sativa phenomenon with a vivid electric lemon aroma and a clean, energizing effect that made it a regional landmark.
Electric Lemon G is one of the few cannabis strains to achieve iconic status in the American Midwest rather than on the West or East Coast.

An elite, clone-only OG Kush phenotype revered in California dispensary culture. Mothership OG's complex terpene expression and consistent potency make it a benchmark strain for OG quality evaluation.
Mothership OG is a clone-only strain — no seeds exist commercially. Clones change hands for hundreds of dollars each in the California legacy market.
Symbiotic Genetics' combination of MAC's creamy gas with Grape Stomper's punch. MAC Stomper delivers extraordinary trichome production with a complex sweet-fuel-grape aroma.
MAC Stomper is a showcase strain for Symbiotic Genetics and is frequently cited in breeding circles as one of the finest MAC offspring ever developed.
A heavy-hitting OG cross named for its overwhelming fuel aroma. Gas Monkey delivers the full Chemdawg experience in a more compact, manageable plant structure with exceptional resin production.
Gas Monkey's name references both the fuel-dominant aroma and the 'monkey wrench' Chemdawg-style effect — something that fundamentally alters your experience of time.
A beginner-friendly hybrid with an intensely sweet cotton candy aroma driven by floral lavender and fruity Power Plant terpenes. Delivers a smooth, gentle euphoria.
Cotton Candy is one of the most recommended strains for first-time cannabis consumers due to its mild potency, pleasant aroma and non-anxiety-inducing effect profile.

A California hybrid combining Chemdawg's fuel complexity with Tangerine Dream's citrus sweetness. Mob Boss delivers a surprisingly energetic, social sativa-leaning effect from what appears to be indica-dominant genetics.
Mob Boss is one of the few Chemdawg-family hybrids that produces a predominantly sativa-style effect despite its architectural indica growth pattern.
A powerhouse cross of two modern classics — Do-Si-Dos and Gelato 41. Dolato produces extraordinary trichome density and a complex floral-sweet-fuel terpene profile. Heavy, lasting relaxation.
Dolato is used as a parent strain by numerous elite breeders and its genetics appear in dozens of high-end 2022-2024 releases.
A striking combination of Purple Punch's grape candy and Wedding Cake's vanilla richness. Double Cup produces visually stunning purple buds with a layered sweet dessert terpene profile.
Double Cup won multiple awards at the 2020 Emerald Cup and is considered one of the finest purple hybrid expressions of the modern era.
Archive Seed Bank's high-potency fusion delivering creamy candy and fuel aromatics alongside knockout balanced effects. Jokerz consistently tests at the top end of commercial THC ranges.
Jokerz is one of Archive Seed Bank's most popular modern releases and has been crossed extensively to produce a new generation of ultra-high-potency hybrids.
Nirvana Seeds' tropical indica named for its persistent fruity papaya-mango aroma. An approachable, moderate-potency indica with strong garden performance and crowd-pleasing smooth effects.
Papaya is one of Nirvana Seeds' top-selling indica strains and has introduced millions of European consumers to fruit-forward indica genetics.
An aggressive-sounding name for an equally aggressive hybrid. Slapz delivers immediate, face-flushing euphoria from Runtz's candy profile amplified by Grease Monkey's resinous body weight.
Slapz is among the fastest-rising strains in California dispensary sales in 2023, praised for consistent quality and an immediately recognizable effect onset.

An indica-dominant cross known for extraordinary THC content that has tested above 33% in some lab results. Oreoz delivers an intensely sweet cookies-and-cream aroma and a powerful, disorienting effect.
Oreoz has tested above 33% THC in multiple lab analyses, placing it among the top 5 highest-THC strains ever officially documented.
A crisp, refreshing sativa-leaning hybrid with a prominent sour Granny Smith apple aroma. Sour Apple delivers functional, uplifting energy with a clean, non-sedating effect profile.
Sour Apple's precise Granny Smith aroma is driven by a rare terpene combination of terpinolene and alpha-pinene that creates the illusion of fresh-cut apple.
One of the most beloved strains to emerge from the Midwest — Strawberry Fields delivers a true strawberry candy aroma and a smooth, uplifting effect that made it a regional cultural landmark.
Strawberry Fields is an Ohio legacy strain that achieved wider fame after appearing in several cannabis publication strain reviews in the mid-2000s.
LPC x Las Vegas Lemon Skunk
A cross from DNA Genetics that achieves near-perfect balance of lemon freshness and OG earthiness. Lemon OG delivers a fast-acting, full-spectrum euphoria.
Lemon OG was developed by DNA Genetics in Nevada — one of the few iconic cannabis strains to originate in the desert Southwest.

Oregon's unofficial state sativa — Dream Beaver combines Blue Dream's dependable California genetics with Plushberry's fruity PNW character. A proud Pacific Northwest contribution to cannabis culture.
Dream Beaver takes its unusual name from Oregon's state animal — the beaver — as a statement of Pacific Northwest cannabis pride.
